description_for_human: Search ten official Australian legal sources
description_for_model: Use this plugin for source-grounded Australian legal and tax research. Every search and definition request must select exactly one registered source. Start with search, then use typed chunk and document references for follow-up retrieval. Treat results as research material, not legal advice.

functions.name: search
functions.description: Search exactly one official Australian legal source.

functions.name: get_chunks
functions.description: Read typed corpus chunks and bounded neighbours.

functions.name: get_asset
functions.description: Resolve a retained source-qualified image asset.

functions.name: get_doc_anchors
functions.description: Read anchors, links, history and reverse citations.

functions.name: get_definition
functions.description: Find definitions within one explicit legal source.

functions.name: stats
functions.description: Read corpus counts, source metadata and search policy.

functions.name: fetch
functions.description: Live-fetch one canonical official legal document URI.

conversation_starters.title: Tax guidance
conversation_starters.text: Search the ATO source for current guidance on research and development tax incentive eligibility.

conversation_starters.title: Federal legislation
conversation_starters.text: Search the Federal Register of Legislation for the statutory definition of taxable income.

conversation_starters.title: Case law
conversation_starters.text: Search Federal Court decisions for recent authorities concerning legal professional privilege.
